message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync 0.2.5 → 0.3.0 (crates.io v0.3.0) across fj crates

Matches the rest of the franken-* stack moving onto asupersync v0.3.0.

- crates/fj-runtime/Cargo.toml: `asupersync = { version = "0.2.5",
  default-features = false, optional = true }` → `{ version = "0.3.0",
  default-features = false, optional = true }`.
- crates/fj-conformance/Cargo.toml: `asupersync = "0.2.5"` → `"0.3.0"`.
- Cargo.lock: refreshed via `cargo update`.
